imageAlt: A simpler way to manage CIS clients
title: A simpler way to manage CIS
summaryBody: Remove the CIS admin overhead with direct categorisation of transactions

detailBlocks.text: **Connect a bank feed.** Make bank feed connection the default onboarding milestone for every CIS client, then keep feeds live at scale with bulk reconsent from the dashboard. **CIS taken directly from bank transactions.** Categorise transactions, via automation or bank rules, into CIS treatment. **File quarterly updates at scale.** Bulk file across clients, or opt into auto-filing for the lowest-touch quarterly cadence.
